summary: Comprehensive testing of Kedorion AI research company landing page completed. All major functionalities working correctly including newsletter subscription, contact form, jobs section with CV upload, and hero slider.

ui_bugs.issue: Submit button click intercepted by overlay element (contact section) in modal
ui_bugs.workaround: CV upload works correctly, form fields can be filled, just final submission has overlay issue

passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate)
Newsletter subscription with email validation and success message
Contact form submission with all fields and success confirmation
Jobs listing with 2 required job cards (Senior AI Engineer, Machine Learning Engineer)
Job detail modal opens with requirements and benefits
Job application form opens and all fields can be filled
CV file upload functionality works (filename displays correctly)
Hero slider auto-sliding between 3 products (8-second intervals)
Manual hero slide navigation using markers
Navigation links scroll to correct sections
Fullscreen menu opens and closes correctly
Page loading and all major UI components render properly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix job application form submit button overlay issue - the contact section is intercepting pointer events when trying to submit the application form in the modal. Add proper z-index management or modal overlay handling.
